description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.9-slim Docker image and defining two stages: tests and build. In the tests stage add a tests job that runs echo "Installing dependencies", then pip install -r requirements.txt, then echo "Running unittests" and executes export PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH:$(pwd) && pytest --cov=configgen. In the build stage add a build job that runs echo "Building configgen" followed by python setup.py install. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
